userStories.title: Fix testnet validator address in .env
userStories.description: Update VALIDATOR_ADDRESS in .env to match the currently deployed testnet validator contract so integration tests pass.

userStories.title: Add vitest TypeScript tests to GitHub Actions workflow
userStories.description: Extend the existing CI workflow to install Node dependencies and run vitest tests (including skill unit tests) so TypeScript code is validated on every push/PR.

userStories.title: Add getModulesWithNames view function to AgentRepValidator
userStories.description: Add a view function that returns all module addresses, names, weights, and active states in a single call to eliminate N+1 RPC queries from the Skill layer.

userStories.title: Expose CLI entry point for Skill commands
userStories.description: Create a lightweight CLI (e.g., using Commander.js) so users can run rep:register, rep:evaluate, rep:query, rep:compare, and rep:modules from the terminal.

userStories.title: Add OpenAPI documentation for HTTP API
userStories.description: Generate OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for the Skill endpoints to lower integration cost for third-party Agent platforms.
